title: Resource Quotas — Terminating Pods scope
text:
This scope only tracks quota consumed by Pods that are terminating. The
operator
for a
scopeSelector
must be
Exists
.
A Pod is considered as
terminating
if the
.spec.activeDeadlineSeconds
field is set to any number.
You can use a ResourceQuota with this scope to manage the following resources:
count.pods
pods
cpu
memory
requests.cpu
requests.memory
limits.cpu
limits.memory
